# PD-BioStampRC21 (IEEE DataPort)

**Link:** https://ieee-dataport.org/open-access/pd-biostamprc21-parkinsons-disease-accelerometry-dataset-five-wearable-sensor-study-0  
**DOI:** 10.21227/g2g8-1503  

Team note: labels are **PD vs HC (and protocol)** — **not** sample-level tremor on every row. Use for **pretraining / careful modeling**, not naive per-window supervised labels. Big download — only pull when needed. Cite the NPJ paper from the DataPort page.
